title: Question: AST XML generated file: sensitivity's trigger missing
body: --- Author Name: **Alexis G** Original Redmine Message: 2480 from https://www.veripool.org --- Hi all, I generated the AST but there is no information about the trigger of the sensitivity signal. (no posedge/negedge) ``` ``` ``` always @ (posedge i_clk) begin ``` I might open an issue and solve it if it's not the right behavior. Thank you,
